course.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #13 - XP Farm
course.description: Learn English with Minecraft — Episode 8. 5 curated listening segments with cloze quizzes.

lesson.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #13 - XP Farm

question.prompt: How high did the player need to build the XP farm platform?

options: Up to level 163 (100 blocks above sea level)
Up to level 80 (just above the surface)
